purpose: Record persistent MORI/AITER JIT cache support for the direct TorchTitan DeepSeek-V4 MORI+AITER bridge so cold container JIT compile does not contaminate follow-up canary timings.

cache_policy.note: /local/data/sonle5/dsv4_pretrain_canary_20260527 is the compatibility symlink to /scratch for this experiment payload.

aiter_jit.init_rule: Before bind-mounting, copy the image's aiter/jit package files into the host cache when __init__.py is absent, so the mount does not hide AITER's Python JIT helpers.

check_config.command_shape: IMAGE=onenexus/nexus-titan:rocm722-pytorch-nightly-mori CANARY_MOE_COMM_BACKEND=mori CANARY_EXPERIMENTAL_MORI_AITER_MOE=1 GPUS_PER_NODE=4 CANARY_EP=4 CANARY_GBS=64 CANARY_SEQ_LEN=128 CANARY_STEPS=1 launchers/torchtitan_direct_deepseek_v4_4x8xmi350_canary.sh check-config

warm_run.read: Cold persistent-cache warmup compiled MORI shmem/EP kernels and AITER core/sorting/two-stage MoE kernels into the mounted cache. Do not use this timing as performance evidence.

reuse_run.read: Second disposable container imported the cached MORI/AITER products and completed the same train step with no observed AITER start-build or MORI compile lines.

commands_run: IMAGE=onenexus/nexus-titan:rocm722-pytorch-nightly-mori CANARY_MOE_COMM_BACKEND=mori CANARY_EXPERIMENTAL_MORI_AITER_MOE=1 GPUS_PER_NODE=4 CANARY_EP=4 CANARY_GBS=64 CANARY_SEQ_LEN=128 CANARY_STEPS=1 launchers/torchtitan_direct_deepseek_v4_4x8xmi350_canary.sh check-config

RUN_ID=torchtitan_direct_dsv4_mori_aiter_jitcache_warm_4x_s128_gbs4_20260602T000000 IMAGE=onenexus/nexus-titan:rocm722-pytorch-nightly-mori GPUS_PER_NODE=4 CANARY_EP=4 CANARY_VISIBLE_DEVICES=4,5,6,7 CANARY_SEQ_LEN=128 CANARY_GBS=4 CANARY_STEPS=1 CANARY_CHECKPOINT_ENABLE=false CANARY_ACTIVATION_CHECKPOINT_MODE=none CANARY_DSA_INDEXER_LOSS_COEFF=0 CANARY_MOE_COMM_BACKEND=mori CANARY_EXPERIMENTAL_MORI_AITER_MOE=1 launchers/torchtitan_direct_deepseek_v4_4x8xmi350_canary.sh run

RUN_ID=torchtitan_direct_dsv4_mori_aiter_jitcache_reuse_4x_s128_gbs4_20260602T000000 IMAGE=onenexus/nexus-titan:rocm722-pytorch-nightly-mori GPUS_PER_NODE=4 CANARY_EP=4 CANARY_VISIBLE_DEVICES=4,5,6,7 CANARY_SEQ_LEN=128 CANARY_GBS=4 CANARY_STEPS=1 CANARY_CHECKPOINT_ENABLE=false CANARY_ACTIVATION_CHECKPOINT_MODE=none CANARY_DSA_INDEXER_LOSS_COEFF=0 CANARY_MOE_COMM_BACKEND=mori CANARY_EXPERIMENTAL_MORI_AITER_MOE=1 launchers/torchtitan_direct_deepseek_v4_4x8xmi350_canary.sh run
